mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO prescription_item ( id, prescription_id, sort_order, drug_name, drug_specification, dosage_text, frequency_text, duration_text, quantity, unit, route, created_at ) VALUES
( #{item.id}, #{item.prescriptionId}, #{item.sortOrder}, #{item.drugName}, #{item.drugSpecification}, #{item.dosageText}, #{item.frequencyText}, #{item.durationText}, #{item.quantity}, #{item.unit}, #{item.route}, #{item.createdAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, version, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at, prescription_no, record_id, encounter_id, patient_id, doctor_id, prescription_status FROM prescription_order WHERE encounter_id = #{encounterId} AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT id, prescription_id, sort_order, drug_name, drug_specification, dosage_text, frequency_text, duration_text, quantity, unit, route, created_at FROM prescription_item WHERE prescription_id = #{prescriptionId} ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC

SELECT id, version, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at, prescription_no, record_id, encounter_id, patient_id, doctor_id, prescription_status FROM prescription_order WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
